sll $0,$0,0        # 空指令（和你示例一致）

# 初始化寄存器
addi $0,$0,0x0000
addi $1,$0,0xFFFB  # 负数，用于分支
addi $2,$0,0xFFFF  # 负数，用于分支
addi $13,$0,0x0005 # 正数，用于不分支
addi $14,$0,0x0000 # 零，用于不分支

# ==============================
# 第一阶段：连续3次 分支预测错误
# 预测：不分支 | 实际：分支
# ==============================

# 错误1
bltz $1,TARGET1
addi $3,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET1:
addi $4,$0,0x0001

# 错误2
bltz $2,TARGET2
addi $5,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET2:
addi $6,$0,0x0001

# 错误3
bltz $1,TARGET3
addi $7,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET3:
addi $8,$0,0x0001

# ==============================
# 第二阶段：连续3次 分支预测正确
# 预测：不分支 | 实际：不分支
# ==============================

# 正确1
bltz $13,TARGET4
addi $9,$0,0x0001
j TARGET4_SKIP
TARGET4:
addi $9,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET4_SKIP:

# 正确2
bltz $14,TARGET5
addi $10,$0,0x0001
j TARGET5_SKIP
TARGET5:
addi $10,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET5_SKIP:

# 正确3
bltz $13,TARGET6
addi $11,$0,0x0001
j TARGET6_SKIP
TARGET6:
addi $11,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET6_SKIP:

# ==============================
# 第三阶段：连续2次 分支预测正确
# 预测：不分支 | 实际：不分支
# ==============================

# 正确4
bltz $14,TARGET7
addi $12,$0,0x0001
j TARGET7_SKIP
TARGET7:
addi $12,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET7_SKIP:

# 正确5
bltz $13,TARGET8
addi $15,$0,0x0001
j TARGET8_SKIP
TARGET8:
addi $15,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET8_SKIP:

# ==============================
# 第四阶段：连续2次 分支预测错误
# 预测：不分支 | 实际：分支
# ==============================

# 错误4
bltz $1,TARGET9
addi $16,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET9:
addi $16,$0,0x0001

# 错误5
bltz $2,TARGET10
addi $17,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET10:
addi $17,$0,0x0001

# ==============================
# 第五阶段：1次正确 + 1次错误
# ==============================

# 正确6
bltz $14,TARGET11
addi $18,$0,0x0001
j TARGET11_SKIP
TARGET11:
addi $18,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET11_SKIP:

# 错误6
bltz $1,TARGET12
addi $19,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET12:
addi $19,$0,0x0001

halt
